docket_entries.description: EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED DEC-03-2018 ORDERED DESTROYED
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-10-2018 - JUDGMENT.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $628.00 FILED BY SHARED LLC AS TO DEFENDANT KOURAKIN, DENIS ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-10-2018 AT 05:30 PM IN DEPT 506
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF SHARED LLC

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SHARED LLC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT NGX BIO INC. $285.30 PRINCIPAL, $30.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $315.30, NGX BIO SHALL PAY SHARED LLC $285.30. DENNIS KOURAKIN SHALL BE DISMISSED. MEMORANDUM AND ORDER FOR STATMENT OF REASON STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $0.00 SERVED JUL-30-2018, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT KOURAKIN, DENIS

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF SEP-10-2018 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF SEP-10-2018 BY CHRISTINE VAN AKEN. 506 PLAINTIFF SHARED LLC IS PRESENT, REPRESENTED BY MARILY LI, SOLE MEMBER OF LLC. DEFENDANT DENIS KOURAKIN IS PRESENT. AFTER HEARING TESTIMONY AND REVIEWING EVIDENCE, IT WAS DETERMINED BY HONORABLE CHRISTINE VAN AKEN THAT DEFENDANT DENIS KOURAKIN IS NOT THE PROPER DEFENDANT, BUT RATHER THE BUSINESS THAT EMPLOYS DENIS KOURAKIN IS RIGHT DEFENDANT. PLAINTIFF EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: CHRISTINE VAN AKEN; CLERK: G. FELICIANO; NOT REPORTED. 506
